import re, math, unicodedata, difflib

AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = '\u0640'

def normalize_ar(s):
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch != TATWEEL)
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub('', s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ئ','ي').replace('ؤ','و')
    # unify alef maqsurah
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # unify ta marbuta
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation and non-Arabic letters except space
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]', ' ', s)
    # collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = normalize_ar(a).split()
    tb = normalize_ar(b).split()
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if common == 0:
        return 0.0
    prec = common / max(1, sum(cb.values()))
    rec = common / max(1, sum(ca.values()))
    f1 = 0 if (prec+rec)==0 else 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # normalized version
    a_n = normalize_ar(a)
    b_n = normalize_ar(b)
    n, m = len(a_n), len(b_n)
    if n==0 or m==0:
        return 0
    # Use dynamic programming with optimization if length small
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if a_n[i-1] == b_n[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

def lcs_ratio(a, b):
    l = lcs_length(a, b)
    denom = max(len(normalize_ar(a)), len(normalize_ar(b)))
    return 0.0 if denom == 0 else l/denom

def seq_ratio(a, b):
    return difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, normalize_ar(a), normalize_ar(b)).ratio()

def robust_similarity(a, b):
    # Combine LCS, SequenceMatcher, and token F1
    l = lcs_ratio(a,b)
    s = seq_ratio(a,b)
    f = token_f1(a,b)
    return max(l,s,f), {'lcs':l,'seq':s,'f1':f}

    "وَلَا تُصَعِّرْ خَدَّكَ لِلنَّاسِ وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ",
    "قُلِ ادْعُوا اللَّهَ أَوِ ادْعُوا الرَّحْمَـٰنَ ۖ أَيًّا مَّا تَدْعُوا فَلَهُ الْأَسْمَاءُ الْحُسْنَىٰ ۖ وَلَا تَجْهَرْ بِصَلَاتِكَ وَلَا تُخَافِتْ بِهَا وَابْتَغِ بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ سَبِيلًا",
    "فَلَا تَغُرَّنَّكُمُ الْحَيَاةُ الدُّنْيَا وَلَا يَغُرَّنَّكُم بِاللَّهِ الْغَرُورُ",
]

orig = "وَلَا تَجْهَرْ بِصَوْتِكَ وَلَا تَسْتَعْجِبْ بِالْغُرُورِ"

def best_matches_in_quran(query, topn=10):
    scores = []
    for rec in quran_data:
        text = rec['ayah_text']
        sim, parts = robust_similarity(query, text)
        if sim > 0.2:
            scores.append((sim, parts, rec))
    scores.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return scores[:topn]

top = best_matches_in_quran(orig, topn=10)
[(s, p, (r['surah_name'], r['ayah_id'], r['ayah_text'][:60])) for s,p,r in top]
